name: Reality Foundations
summary: A path for people who want the deepest possible base layer: physics, systems, history, philosophy, and the structure of reality before application.
thesis: Build a clean model of the world from first principles before moving into synthesis.
fitSignals: Prefers definitions, mechanisms, and causal reasoning
Wants to understand how the world works before what to do with it
Feels drawn to science, history, and philosophy
Learns best through conceptual clarity and structured progression

defaults.reviewRhythm: Weekly review with short daily recall and one deeper synthesis session
defaults.milestoneTemplate: Build a first-principles map of {coreSubject} with {supportingTopic} through the {role} lens

weeklyCadencePresets.gentle: 3 short sessions and one review block per week
weeklyCadencePresets.balanced: 4 to 5 sessions per week with steady depth
weeklyCadencePresets.ambitious: 5 to 6 sessions per week with one applied project
weeklyCadencePresets.obsessive: Daily study with recurring note synthesis and review
